# `dnsight mx generate`

Print MX RDATA lines from pref:host rows.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--mx` | text | — | yes | Comma-separated pref:host rows (e.g. "10:mail.example.com,20:mx2.example.com"). |
